rulings.Case Title: ERIN WIDEN VS. THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Dec. 13, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT IN INTERVENTION DANIEL MULDERRY's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD GRANTED. COUNSEL TO PREPARE ORDER.= (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JOSE CERON ET AL VS. SALLY LIU ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Dec. 13, 2019 line 2. CROSS DEFENDANTs JOSE CERON and WENDY ENRIQUEZ's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT OVERRULLED. NOTICE OF DEMURRER INDICATES THAT CROSS COMPLAINANTS DEMUR TO THE ENTIRE THIRD AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT. POINTS OR AUTHORITIES ADDRESS PURPORTED DEFICIENCY ONLY IN SOME OF 23 ASSERTED CAUSES OF ACTION. FURTHER, THIRD AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT IS NOT MOOT AND REMAINS AN OPERATIVE PLEADING ON FILE.= (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TRAVIS HELLYER VS. DARLA CARROLL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel A Discovery Response To Special Interrogatory No. 32 From Defendant; Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Dec. 13, 2019 line 4. PLAINTIFF TRAVIS HELLYER's Motion To Compel A Discovery Response To Special Interrogatory No. 32 From Defendant; Request For Sanctions GRANTED. ALL OBJECTIONS ARE OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,387.50, PLUS ANY ADDITIONAL FEES INCURRED FOR THE HEARING. = (501/CFH)
